sections.name: Hero Section
sections.purpose: Displays a prominent banner showcasing the company's brand and key message: BUILDING LEGACIES. ENGINEERING EXCELLENCE.

sections.name: About Us Snippet
sections.purpose: Provides a brief introduction to the company's mission and expertise.

sections.name: Certifications
sections.purpose: Highlights industry recognitions and official accreditations of the company.

sections.name: Why Choose Us
sections.purpose: Explains the unique benefits and value proposition the company offers to clients.

sections.name: Core Services Overview
sections.purpose: Showcases the main services offered with quick links to detailed pages.

sections.name: Featured Projects
sections.purpose: Displays a curated selection of successful past projects to demonstrate capabilities.

sections.name: Client Testimonials
sections.purpose: Presents feedback and endorsements from satisfied clients.

sections.name: Call to Action
sections.purpose: Encourages visitors to take the next step, such as requesting a quote or learning more.

sections.name: Contact Form
sections.purpose: Allows visitors to easily submit inquiries directly from the homepage.

sections.name: Company Story & Mission
sections.purpose: Narrates the company's history, core values, and overall purpose in the industry.

sections.name: Our Vision & Philosophy
sections.purpose: Articulates the company's future aspirations and guiding principles for all projects.

sections.name: Meet the Team
sections.purpose: Introduces the experienced professionals and leadership behind the company's success.

sections.name: Our Expertise & Approach
sections.purpose: Explains the unique methods and specialized skills the company employs to deliver excellence.

sections.name: Awards & Recognition
sections.purpose: Showcases any significant achievements, industry accolades, or special recognitions received.

sections.name: Services Introduction
sections.purpose: Provides an overview of the comprehensive range of construction, design, and project management services.

sections.name: Residential Solutions
sections.purpose: Details specialized services tailored for home owners, including interior design, renovation, and A&A works for residential properties.

sections.name: Commercial Solutions
sections.purpose: Outlines expert services designed for businesses and commercial developments, covering design, build, and project management.

sections.name: Interior Design
sections.purpose: Explains the creative and functional interior planning and execution services, focusing on aesthetics and usability.

sections.name: Renovation Services
sections.purpose: Describes comprehensive remodeling and upgrading solutions for various spaces, enhancing functionality and appeal.

sections.name: Full Project Management
sections.purpose: Details the end-to-end oversight and coordination of complex projects, ensuring timely and budget-conscious completion.

sections.name: A&A Works (Additions & Alterations)
sections.purpose: Focuses on modifying and expanding existing structures efficiently, meeting evolving client needs.

sections.name: Design & Build
sections.purpose: Presents an integrated service offering seamless design and construction from concept to completion under one roof.

sections.name: Our Service Process
sections.purpose: Illustrates the step-by-step methodology used to deliver projects successfully, from consultation to handover.

sections.name: Get in Touch
sections.purpose: Provides all necessary contact information including phone numbers, email addresses, and physical address for easy communication.

sections.name: Contact Form
sections.purpose: Offers a direct way for clients to send inquiries or requests conveniently from the website.

sections.name: Office Location & Map
sections.purpose: Displays the company's physical address and an interactive map for easy navigation.

sections.name: Business Hours
sections.purpose: Specifies the operational timings and days for client convenience and planned visits.

sections.name: Social Media
sections.purpose: Links to the company's official social media profiles for engagement and updates.
